differences: The 4N3D visual design intentionally remains the old dark travel-journal style.
Only the title text structure is changed to combine the section badge and title.
Inline hashtags are intentionally hidden on every 4N3D page.
The Route map page is intentionally removed from every 4N3D list.
suggestions: Keep the old 4N3D background, badge, and timeline styling.
Use the combined title text pattern for all 4N3D non-cover pages.
Do not render caption hashtags inside 4N3D story pages.
Keep 4N3D lists at cover plus Day 01 through Day 04, Lưu trú, and Dịch vụ.
visual_verdict.reasoning: The correction keeps the old 4N3D interface while changing only the title text structure, removing visible inline hashtags, and dropping the Route map page from 4N3D.

evidence.generated_screenshot: Generated and inspected with Chrome headless during this turn.
